ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Continued To Mar-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that he received a signed petition via fax this morning and that he was notified by the Department of Health Services that they will not be filing a claim. Status on close of the Estate was continued to January 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Jan-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that the delay was due to his Client being in a rehabilation center, that she was released last week, that letters were just issued and sent to the Department of Health Services, and that he needs time to obtain exemptions for the Estate. Status on close of the Estate was continued to January 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that he has not heard from Charles Grisby nor his Attorney. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration and granted the Petition for Removal of Administrator and Revocation of Letters (subject to review of the orders). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition For Removal Of Administrator And Revocation Of Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Removal Of Administrator And Revocation Of Letters Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-05-288006 Estate of Sarah Edmonia Porter.

Amy Harrington appeared for Attorney Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Ms. Harrington explained that the Heirs in the Porter matter are now willing to proceed with the probate petition and that Mr. Vann is going to petition to have someone else appointed in the Grisby matter. Both matters were continued to February 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-05-288006 Estate of Sarah Edmonia Porter.

Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

The status hearings were taken off calendar. The Court will send a Notice to Intention to Close the Estate's on the Court's Own Motion to April Funkhouser and Debra Ann Franklin.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Continued To Dec-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to April Funkhouser and Attorney Dennis Vann to appear on December 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to report status of the Estate. The matter was also continued to December 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Continued To Nov-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that Counsel in Fresno has agreed that his Clients will resign, that they located the original will and that he will file the petition to have the will admitted once he receives the resignation. The matter was continued to November 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Continued To Aug-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Judge Wiss disclosed that Counsel Amy Harrington is the Spouse of a fellow Bench Officer and that she does not feel that this fact will affect her ability to be fair and impartial to all Parties and all Counsel. Mr. Vann stated that he was never notified that the case was transferred to San Francisco, that the original will is here, that he has not heard from the Client in years and that the Estate of Sarah Porter (PES-05-288006) is here as well. The Court stated that the Estate needs to be processed, that the property is still there and that Debra Porter (Granddaughter) has been keeping up the property taxes. Status of administration of the Estate was continued to August 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jun-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

No appearance was made by Mr. Vann or Ms. Harrington to explain status of the matter. Both Counsel are dealing with medical issues, Therfore, the matter was continued to June 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Administrator Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Continued To May-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
